title: elymus intermedius
intro: Elymus intermedius, also known as the beaked wheat grass or intermediate wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Elymus intermedius include its ability to improve digestion, boost energy, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Elymus intermedius is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
